positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~appears_in_company_today(james)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    remote_home(X0) | lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~lunch_in_company(james)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    lunch_at_home(X0) | lunch_in_company(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~remote_home(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~lunch_at_home(X0) | remote_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define schedule_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define go_to_company_today(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
